data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest across Google services.
data.technical_spec: TLS protocols, HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS), and encryption keys.

data.title: Automatic Security Updates
data.description: Regular updates automatically applied to enhance security.
data.technical_spec: Patch management and update automation for rapid deployment.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Leveraging AI for real-time threat monitoring and intrusion detection.
data.technical_spec: Behavior analysis, anomaly detection, and machine learning models.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhanced account security with user authentication beyond passwords.
data.technical_spec: OTP delivery, authenticator apps, and U2F/UAF support.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Robust defenses against distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Traffic analysis, rate limiting, and absorption strategies.
